assumptions: Top and bottom panels fit between side panels.
Back panel fits between side panels and between top/bottom panels.

panels.name: left_side
panels.notes: Full-height left side; no kerf, rabbets, dados, or edging allowance.

panels.name: right_side
panels.notes: Full-height right side; no kerf, rabbets, dados, or edging allowance.

panels.name: bottom_panel
panels.notes: Fits between side panels; no kerf, rabbets, dados, or edging allowance.

panels.name: top_panel
panels.notes: Fits between side panels; no sink cut-out, kerf, rabbets, dados, or edging allowance.

panels.name: back_panel
panels.notes: Fits between side panels and between top/bottom panels; no kerf or joinery allowance.
